title: The Agent Loop
description: A minimal agent that uses tools to accomplish tasks

steps.content: Create a file called Hello.java that prints 'Hello, World!'
steps.annotation: User sends a task to the agent

steps.content: I'll create that file for you.
steps.annotation: The model decides to use write_file tool
Tool call: the model creates a Java source file

steps.content: Let me verify the file was created correctly.
steps.annotation: The loop continues: model sees the result and decides next action

steps.content: Done! I've created Hello.java with the main method. You can run it with `javac Hello.java && java Hello`.
steps.annotation: No more tool calls -> loop breaks, agent responds to user
